name: Storm Spirit
description: Everyone complains about the weather…well, I'm doing something about it!

abilities.name: Galvanized
abilities.description: Innately grants Storm Spirit permanent mana regeneration bonus over time in certain conditions. Mana Regen Bonus per Gained Charge: 0.1. Effect Radius: 1200. Mana Regen Bonus per Charge: 0.2.

abilities.name: Static Remnant
abilities.description: After an activation delay, the remnant detonates and deals damage if an enemy unit comes near it. When activated, the ability creates an explosively charged remnant of Raijin that gives vision for a period of time at his current location. The remnant does not move. Cast Range: 800. Vision Radius: 100. Remnant Speed: 300. Remnant Duration: 12. Proc Radius: 235. Damage Radius: 300. Cooldown: 3.5 (2.25). Mana Cost: 70/80/90/100.

abilities.name: Electric Vortex
abilities.description: Pulls an enemy unit to Raijin's location. Cast Range: 300 (0). Pull Distance: 180/220/260/300. Break Distance: 1200. Duration: 1.1/1.4/1.7/2 (1.3/1.6/1.9/2.2). Effect Radius: (475). Cooldown: 20/18/16/14. Mana Cost: 60/70/80/90.

abilities.name: Overload
abilities.description: Raijin overloads and creates an electrical charge upon an ability cast. The next attack deals damage and applies a slow within attacked enemy unit's radius. Damage Radius: 300. Damage: 25/50/75/100. Move Speed Slow: 80% (100%). Attack Speed Slow: 90 (110). Slow Duration: 0.8. Search Radius: (700).

abilities.name: Ball Lightning
abilities.description: Charging across the battlefield until he depletes his mana or reaches his target. The damage increases linearly as Raijin travels, starting from the cast location. Cast Range: Global. Damage Radius: 200. Travel Speed: 1400/1850/2300. Distance Interval: 100. Distance to Damage: 6/10/14. Distance Counter: (450). Cooldown: 0.
